sections.title: Initial dialogue after achieving Champion rank or higher in the Fortis Colosseum

lines.speaker: Harminia
lines.text: ... Wait a minute... you're that adventurer that has been taking on the Colosseum!

lines.speaker: Harminia
lines.text: Wow, what are the chances you'd run into a simple farmer like me.

lines.speaker: Harminia
lines.text: I suppose you might be needing a reliable herb supply if you're planning to continue fighting in the Colosseum?

lines.speaker: Harminia
lines.text: I'll keep an eye on any herbs you plant here. It's the least I can do for someone like you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a really kind gesture, but aren't you meant to be focusing on growing your own food?

lines.speaker: Harminia
lines.text: It's no trouble. The soil around here is very rich, so it won't need much attention at all. I might even get a reward from the palace for helping such a valiant contender!

lines.speaker: Harminia
lines.text: Best of luck on your journey, Champion!

lines.speaker: Harminia
lines.text: Best of luck on your journey, Grand Champion!
